_comment: Add a _ before an option name to comment it out and it wont be added to the apworld
Using 'goal' as the name of an option let you override some of the generated goal parameters
goal.description: How to End your Randomized playthrough.

filler_traps._comment: Using values here let you set a 'recommended' filler_trap percentage or even a default percentage

description: Add all 20 characters to the item pool
You start only with Link and Impa
If you don't have the item for the character, don't use him or her

divine_beast_randomizer.description: Add the 4 divine beasts in the item pool

description: Add items to unlock the quests in the item pool
The quests for the blacksmith and the military are only those which are not affected by this setting
Add the koroks in the item pool and the 134 koroks locations in main quests and challenges
If not activated, the quests which needs koroks won't be included
Add the Terrako's Compponents in the item pool
If activated, the quest to get Terrako will be accessible when you will have all of them
Add the Ethereal Stones in the item pool
If activated, the quests which needs those stones will be locked until you get enough stones.
If not, the quests will be accessible when you get to them

post_forest.display_name: Include post freeing korok forest checks
post_forest.description: Only change if goal is future of hyrule or hateno fort siege

post_future.display_name: Include post future of hyrule checks
post_future.description: Only change if goal is hateno fort siege
